name: TenantServiceGroup
description: TenantServiceGroup schema from Palo Alto Networks SASE Tenancy Service API

id.description: Unique identifier of the Tenant Service Group.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name of the TSG.

description.description: Optional description of the TSG's purpose.

parent_id.description: ID of the parent TSG in the hierarchy. Null for root-level TSGs.

support_account_id.description: Associated Palo Alto Networks support account identifier.

vertical.description: Industry vertical classification for the TSG.

region.description: Primary geographic region for the TSG.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the TSG was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent TSG modification.
